expectations.text: Identifies LFPBandV1 (or upstream LFP) as needing a new selection only if the new electrodes weren't already in the group
expectations.evidence: 'LFPBandV1 — re-populates only if LFPBandSelection.LFPBandElectrode changed. This is the precise gate'.

expectations.text: Identifies RippleTimesV1 as the table that re-populates
expectations.evidence: 'RippleTimesV1 — re-populates. This is the table whose contents materially change'.

expectations.text: States that RippleParameters is UNAFFECTED because it is a parameter Lookup table, not electrode-dependent
expectations.evidence: 'RippleParameters — UNAFFECTED. It is a dj.Lookup keyed only on ripple_param_name ... It has no electrode dependency'.

expectations.text: Notes unrelated branches (decoding, position) are unaffected unless they consume the same ripple times
expectations.evidence: 'Position pipelines ... UNAFFECTED' and 'Decoding pipelines ... UNAFFECTED unless they directly consume these specific ripple times'.
